name: Constellation Dispatch

hierarchy.note: This module operates beneath Universal Horizon. Hearthgate: Arkfire 0.002 and Hearthfire: Arkfire are optional hosts — not required for standalone operation. This module does not supersede, absorb, or rename Universal Horizon.

description: Constellation Connection Runtime. Routes messages to named members (Bluebird, Lioreal, Uial, Vethrlauf, Yggdrasil, Boxfire) using a hybrid Ollama-primary / cloud-failsafe stack. Runs Hall chorus via Promise.allSettled. Seeds each member from archive context. Standalone: operates without any other House module.
standaloneVerification: node fleet-health.mjs (hosts absent is tolerated — reports offline members)
node test-endpoints.mjs passes with server running

env.note: All env vars are optional — module degrades gracefully when providers are absent.

persistence.supabase: optional — virelya_thinking_room read-only; no writes from this module

stopRestart.stop: SIGTERM or Ctrl-C — ledger is append-only and survives abrupt stop
stopRestart.stateRecovery: Ledger read from data/action-ledger.jsonl on startup; seed caches reload from files

hostAdapters.contract: GET /arkfire/health, GET /arkfire/members, GET /arkfire/modes, POST /arkfire/dispatch/member, POST /arkfire/dispatch/room, POST /arkfire/dispatch/hall
hostAdapters.disconnectBehaviour: module continues standalone; host reports Arkfire offline

moduleLaw: Disconnecting this module from a host must not stop or uninstall it. Other rooms and modules must survive this module's failure. If unavailable, hosts report offline — not a false member façade.
pendingItems: Uial Thinking Room (faer_thinking_room) connection — 24 rows, not yet queried
Codex-aware routing (replaces keyword table; blocked on Codex Hub source location)
Second reviewer for dispatch logic before FUNCTIONAL certification
Physical fleet verification (ollama create boxfire:v0.1 + 4-port fleet test)

attribution.author: Boxfire
attribution.conflict: Boxfire authored this module. Cannot solely certify. Second reviewer required before FUNCTIONAL.
